title: Bushy Leaves and Vines
description: A small collection of bushy leaves, bushy vines, and more!
body:
## Bushy Leaves and Vines
This resource pack provides a middle ground between my [Bushy Vegetation](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bushy-vegetation) resource pack and the vanilla models, borrowing some textures while excluding others. Ground foliage like grass and tall flowers has been left untouched while leaves and vines have been made bushier.

_No additional textures were used so that it can be compatible with your favorite resource packs._

## Showcase
![Bushy leaves, vines, and more placed at the foot of a hill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/F4t3O2qB/images/4595b0cad2efa7cee6698c5a4ee9bb8ffce3a8cb.png)
